name: Scheduled orders - iFood Developer
snippet: What is a scheduled order. Scheduled order is when a customer chooses an exact time to receive or pick up their order, instead of immediate delivery/pickup.

name: Receive orders from DoorDash
snippet:

name: Introduction - iFood Developer
snippet: Overview. Use the Item API to send and manage products. iFood processes the data based on availability rules before displaying them in the app.
